data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for recovery campaign triggers.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the recovery campaign triggers (email/SMS/push), but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to these triggers. The linked use case mentions the need for recovery campaign triggers, yet there is no evidence demonstrating their implementation or validation. Therefore, the assessment is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence to support the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of recovery campaign triggers (email/SMS/push) being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify recovery campaign triggers.
